headline: Adobe (ADBE): A New Healthcare Collaboration Signals A Broader Strategy At Work
summary: With an upside potential of 25.83%, Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) is among the 10 Tech Stocks That Could Make You a Millionaire. On April 28, Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) expanded its Adobe Experience Platform through a collaboration with Alluvium to enhance healthcare capacity management. The initiative leverages Adobe’s data and demand generation capabilities to help healthcare providers optimize […]

headline: Micron Stock Logs Best Week Since 2008: Why The Price Tag Is Still Cheap
summary: Micron is up 27% this week — its best run since December 2008. Despite a 700% rally, the stock still trades at 7x forward earnings.
